title: Procurement & Vendor-Decision Landscape
note: This is NOT a vendor-selection input. It is a positioning map of adjacent commercial tools, used by the pitch deck to show where governed vendor selection sits in the procurement stack. See kb/Domain/Landscape.md.

tools.name: Zip
tools.what: Request capture, approval routing, workflow orchestration

tools.name: Vendor Selection (this project)
tools.what: Cedar-policy-gated convergence on a defensible vendor recommendation with audit trail

tools.name: Coupa
tools.what: Sourcing, contracts, supplier mgmt, S2P platform

tools.name: SAP Ariba
tools.what: Enterprise sourcing, supplier network, contract lifecycle

tools.name: Ramp
tools.what: Corporate cards, AP, expense, vendor spend visibility, renewals; Buyer acquisition added negotiation
tools.notes: Pushed slightly upstream via Buyer acquisition, but still post-selection
